evidence_rea: we will not provide confirmation to you as to whether or not personal data concerning you is being processed
evidence_reg: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller confirmation as to whether or not personal data concerning him or her are being processed
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA expressly denies providing the same confirmation that the REG says the data subject has the right to obtain from the controller.
REG-100 concerns recipients or categories of recipient, while the REA only addresses confirmation of whether data are being processed; there is no quote-supported same-constraint conflict.
REG-098 concerns the purposes of processing, while the REA only states that confirmation will not be provided; there is no direct quoted mismatch on the same requirement.
